Video.summary: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Milos Vukovic v. Igor De Castaneda.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: HOLLYWOOD - Milos Vukovic v. Igor De Castaneda
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: HOLLYWOOD - Milos Vukovic v. Igor De Castaneda

Enfusion 46 - Jaraya v. Ben Moh
Enfusion 46 - Jaraya v. Ben Moh

Video.summary: Live from Miami Beach on April 26, 2018, Karate Combat: Inception is the first event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Held as a private, invite-only spectacle, this video stream will show all of the key fighters, as it happens. Featured on the Main Card: Elhadji "Black Magic" Ndour of the United States versus Andras “The Titan” Virag, a game contender from Hungary. The co-main event features Dionicio Gustavo of the Dominican Republic versus France's Alexandre Bouderbane in a key contest. Other fighters include Adham Sabry of the USA, Spyros Margaritopoulos of Greece, and Joshua Quayhagen from the USA.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: INCEPTION
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: INCEPTION

Image.alt: KARATE COMBAT: INCEPTION
KARATE COMBAT: INCEPTION
KARATE COMBAT: INCEPTION

Video.summary: In this episode, Melissa Croden speaks about some of the things she struggles with as a fighter and how she overcomes those obstacles. Find out how Melissa started out this fight with nerves and anxiety but how she pulled out a huge win against Brittany Paterson.

Video.summary: Wisniewski’s development as a fighter was a family affair, as he and his brother watched tapes of MMA battles then trained in the front yard. Oganov honed his skills in Serbia, while enrolled in the Red Army.
Video.grandparentTitle: Bodog Fight - Erik Oganov v. Keith Wisniewski
Video.title: Bodog Fight - Erik Oganov v. Keith Wisniewski

Image.alt: Bodog Fight - Erik Oganov v. Keith Wisniewski
Bodog Fight - Erik Oganov v. Keith Wisniewski
Bodog Fight - Erik Oganov v. Keith Wisniewski

Video.summary: Cory Knipe has been a professional MMA fighter since 2010. One of his biggest challenges has been to learn to effectively balance work and his MMA training. At HK36, he is up against heavy hitter Anton Tokarchuk in the Light Heavyweight Co-Main event.
Video.grandparentTitle: Out of the Cage - Cory Knipe
Video.title: Out of the Cage - Cory Knipe

Image.alt: Out of the Cage - Cory Knipe
Out of the Cage - Cory Knipe
Out of the Cage - Cory Knipe

Video.summary: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring Jenn Wolstenholme
Video.grandparentTitle: Fighter Profile: Jenn Wolstenholme
Video.title: Fighter Profile: Jenn Wolstenholme

Image.alt: Fighter Profile: Jenn Wolstenholme
Fighter Profile: Jenn Wolstenholme
Fighter Profile: Jenn Wolstenholme

Video.summary: Hard Knocks 46 continues to bring you some of the best fights in MMA! This episode features the exhilarating amateur matchup of Jiu Jitsu athlete Colton Boxell vs. Boxer Mac Laursen. This is followed by the very entertaining pro contest between the ever explosive Vyron Phillips taking on BJJ Black Belt Leo Xavier.
Video.grandparentTitle: Fight Vault - HK46 - Episode 3
Video.title: Fight Vault - HK46 - Episode 3

Video.title: JourneyXIII.mov

Video.summary: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Zac Chalmers at HK40.
Video.grandparentTitle: Out of the Cage - Zac Chalmers
Video.title: Out of the Cage - Zac Chalmers

Image.alt: Out of the Cage - Zac Chalmers
Out of the Cage - Zac Chalmers
Out of the Cage - Zac Chalmers

Video.summary: Have you ever wondered how Ronda Rousey deals with injuries? Hard Knocks fighter Jess Hopkins comes to Sports Condtioning coach Marie Michalski to learn techniques to strengthen her shoulders and improve the muscles in her legs for kicking.
Video.grandparentTitle: After The Fight - Jess Hopkins
Video.title: After The Fight - Jess Hopkins

Image.alt: After The Fight - Jess Hopkins

Video.summary: The excitement never ends at Hard Knocks 43! Watch top Wrestler Justin Basra battle it out against Jason Fournier. Ryan Connor faces Owen Carr from Team Alpha Male in this exciting match displaying high level Jiu Jitsu skills.

Video.summary: Hard Knocks 44 kicks off with an Amateur Title Fight between wrestler Justin Basra and John 'The Dragon' Nguyen. This is followed by pros Zach Snyder vs. Kolton Menzak. Wrapping up this episode with the Main Event is Corey Devela vs. UFC Veteran Nick 'The Promise' Ring, who keeps going after five knee surgeries. You do not want to miss it!

Video.title: Fight Vault - HK44 - Episode 1

Video.summary: MMA Veteran Nick Thompson goes up against the brute force of wrestling star Davion Peterson. Thompson has more pro fight experience than anyone on the first series, and will need all of it to hold his own against the relentless Peterson.
Video.grandparentTitle: Bodog Fight - Episode 5
Video.title: Bodog Fight - Episode 5

Video.summary: The big dogs go at it, as heavyweight Mario “The Big Hurt” Rinaldi puts his stellar record on the line against the hard-working, hard-fighting and hard-living Mark Burch. Rinaldi has never lost, and Burch has been defeated just one, so neither man will give an inch.
Video.grandparentTitle: Bodog Fight - Episode 6
Video.title: Bodog Fight - Episode 6

Image.alt: Bodog Fight - Episode 6

Video.summary: Changing your lifestyle from one of jail and rebellion to one of discipline and MMA is not an easy task, but Todd Stoute is prrof that it is possible to make that switch. At HK38, he is up against Clay Davidson and is looking for the win.
Video.grandparentTitle: Out of the Cage - Todd Stoute
Video.title: Out of the Cage - Todd Stoute

Image.alt: Out of the Cage - Todd Stoute
Out of the Cage - Todd Stoute
Out of the Cage - Todd Stoute
